items.headline: RBI maintains cautious inflation stance, projects robust growth
items.summary: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra indicated the central bank is unlikely to raise its inflation target and may lower it in the long term, while forecasting strong economic growth.

items.headline: Societe Generale forecasts June CPI at 4.1%
items.summary: Societe Generale anticipates India's June 2026 Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation to be around 4.1%, remaining within the RBI's comfort zone.

items.headline: RBI introduces concessional dollar-rupee swap facility for overseas borrowings
items.summary: The RBI's new initiative prompts major Indian banks, including HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, and State Bank of India (SBI), to actively tap overseas debt markets for funds, with ICICI Bank also reportedly planning a dollar bond issue.

items.headline: RBI advocates prohibition for cryptocurrencies
items.summary: The RBI continues to advocate for a policy "leaning towards prohibition" for cryptocurrencies, recommending that banks and other financial institutions be barred from holding or trading in crypto assets and privately issued stablecoins to mitigate contagion risks.

items.headline: Dabur India Q1 FY27 update hints at rural consumption recovery
items.summary: Dabur India's pre-quarterly update suggests a recovery in rural consumption and mid-single-digit domestic volume growth for Q1 FY27.

items.headline: SBI Funds Management files for IPO
items.summary: SBI Funds Management has filed a red herring prospectus for an Initial Public Offering (IPO), with the issue scheduled to open from July 14-16, 2026.

items.headline: Titan, Sheela Foam, RPG Life Sciences, Harsha Engineers International trade ex-dividend
items.summary: Several companies, including Titan Company (₹15 per share), Sheela Foam (₹1 per share), RPG Life Sciences (₹24 per share), and Harsha Engineers International (₹1.50 per share), are trading ex-dividend on July 9th.

items.headline: Craftsman Automation approves investment in Solarcraft Power India 24 Private
items.summary: Craftsman Automation approved an investment in Solarcraft Power India 24 Private.

items.headline: SML Isuzu reports increase in June 2026 commercial vehicle sales and production
items.summary: SML Isuzu announced an increase in its commercial vehicle sales and production figures for June 2026.

items.headline: JSW Energy commissions 1,081 MW of renewable energy capacity
items.summary: JSW Energy announced the commissioning of 1,081 MW of renewable energy capacity.

items.headline: Tata Steel India crude steel production up 11.3% YoY in Q1
items.summary: Tata Steel reported an 11.3% year-on-year increase in India's crude steel production for Q1.

items.headline: Natco Pharma announces significant investment plans in South Africa
items.summary: Natco Pharma announced plans for significant investments in South Africa.

items.headline: Mahindra & Mahindra implements price hikes across its vehicle range
items.summary: Mahindra & Mahindra has implemented price hikes across its vehicle range.

items.headline: HFCL unveils capacity expansion plan
items.summary: HFCL announced a plan for capacity expansion.

items.headline: ICRA reaffirms Greenpanel Industries' long-term and short-term ratings
items.summary: ICRA reaffirmed its long-term and short-term ratings for Greenpanel Industries.
